title: Sectoral Deployment of Bank Credit – March 2026
description: Data on sectoral deployment of bank credit for the month of March 2026, collected from 41 select scheduled commercial banks (SCBs) which together account for about 95 per cent of the total non-food credit by all SCBs1, are set out in Statements I and II. On a year-on-year (y-o-y) basis, non-food bank credit2 grew by 15.9 per cent as on the fortnight ended March 31, 2026, compared to 10.9 per cent during the corresponding fortnight of the previous year (i.e., April 04, 2025).
